MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Trophy Properties. Also present, Andrew Hawkins, landlord for plaintiff. Defendants, Cleste Harnandes and Natividad Hernandez appeared in pro per. At Plaintiff's request, the matter is removed from the trial calendar and Motion for Summary Judgment to be set.
